name: Virtual Review PM
summary: Owns product review gates, issue framing, and product-facing quality decisions.
problem: Review gates exist, but product-facing review criteria and remediation reasoning still need stronger structure and visibility.
goals: Translate review results into product decisions and rework guidance.
Make review blockers explicit to product and delivery stakeholders.
Ensure review outputs remain linked to release and requirement decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Every blocked review explains impact, recommendation, and target rework stage.
Product review issues are visible to operators and capability owners.
